query:
SELECT
            id
            , ip_address as "ip_address: DbIpAddr"
            , connected_at
            , disconnected_at
            , time_spent as "time_spent: DbDuration"
            , bytes_sent
            , country_code
            , country_name
            , city
            , latitude
            , longitude
        FROM (
            SELECT
                id
                , ip_address
                , connected_at
                , disconnected_at
                , time_spent
                , bytes_sent
                , country_code
                , country_name
                , city
                , latitude
                , longitude
            FROM
                connections
            WHERE
                id > $1
            ORDER BY
                id DESC
            LIMIT $2
        ) AS subquery
        ORDER BY
            id ASC
